TGIMCommonRules.RespinFeature: Each main game spin with one or more winning combination awards a respin.
TGIMCommonRules.DestoryingBlockersFeature1: During main game spins, 12 blockers are present on 12 fixed positions.
TGIMCommonRules.DestoryingBlockersFeature2: When there is a spin with one or more winning combination, each winning symbol will destroy one of the blockers before the next respin starts with more ways.
TGIMCommonRules.BonusRespinFeature1: When all blockers are destroyed, Bonus Respin Feature is triggered with 1 extra life and multiplier of x1.
TGIMCommonRules.BonusRespinFeature3: Each Bonus Respin with one or more winning combination awards a Bonus Respin with the multiplier increased by 1.
TGIMCommonRules.BonusRespinFeature4: All Bonus Respin wins will be multiplied by the current multiplier.
TGIMCommonRules.BonusRespinFeature5: During any Bonus Respin, if there is no win and there is 1 or more extra life, an extra life is used to award a Bonus Respin.
TGIMCommonRules.BonusRespinFeature7: Collecting 15 winning symbols will increase the extra life by 1.

TGIMGameRules.IcescapeMutatedDesc1: Galactic Gems is a 5-reel, 5-row video slot featuring respins and Bonus Respins with multiplier.

IcescapeMutatedDesc2.value: The game is played with 25 base bet for 45 ways (up to %{3125} ways), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
IcescapeMutatedDesc2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations.
IcescapeMutatedDesc2.example: The game is played with 25 base bet for 45 ways (up to %{3125} ways), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 10.

TGIMGameRules.IcescapeMutatedDesc3: Respin is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the respin.
TGIMGameRules.IcescapeMutatedDesc4: Bonus Respin Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Bonus Respin Feature.
TGIMGameRules.BonusRespinFeature2: During the Bonus Respin Feature, the current multiplier and the number of extra lives are shown below the reels.
TGIMGameRules.BonusRespinFeature6: After wins are paid, each winning symbol will be collected.
TGIMGameRules.BonusRespinFeature8: During the main game spin when the Bonus Respin Feature is triggered, any symbol that is not used to destroy the blockers will be used to increase the lives collection before the Bonus Respin Feature begins.
TGIMGameRules.BonusRespinFeature9: The Bonus Respin Feature ends when there is no winning combination and no extra lives left.
